About Gyan Prabha

Meet your
Clinical Nutritionist.

I'm Dt. Gyan Prabha — a Clinical Nutritionist and Wellness Coach with over 7 years of experience helping people heal through science-backed, root-cause nutrition. My approach goes beyond generic diets — I understand your body's unique story and build a plan that actually works for your life.

Holding a Diploma from Jamia Hamdard (Delhi) and a PG Diploma from the British Learning Academy (UK), I hold rare certifications in both Oncology and Diabetes Nutrition — allowing me to support even the most complex health cases.

How It Works

Four steps to
measurable results.

1
Free Discovery Call
Understand your health history, symptoms, and long-term goals — no judgment, no pressure.
2
Root Cause Assessment
Deep clinical analysis of your diet, lab reports, and lifestyle patterns.
3
Personalised Protocol
A science-backed nutrition plan built for your exact body — not a generic template.
4
Guided Support
Regular check-ins and adjustments until you hit your measurable health goals.
